title: Oden Sails with Roger Toward the World’s Truth
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Oden as Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
scene: Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That means we won't see him dancing naked in the street every week?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't know this woman, she doesn't work for me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You wanted to kill me, didn't you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Who sent you?! who are you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The sentence of the Samurais has been decided!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: mother, is father going to come home soon?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I made an origami balloon for Daddy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How magnificent! May he return to us quickly

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: are going to be executed in 3 days

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: by being boiled alive in a pot!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden, Roger, and the Final Voyage storyline with 16 dialogue beats. Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
